data.title: Cloudflare to launch new stablecoin, NET Dollar, for instant payments to AI agents, creators, and developers globally.
data.description: Cloudflare has introduced NET Dollar in an effort to facilitate quick transactions for AI agents, creators, and developers on a global scale. This digital currency is designed to streamline payments within the specified communities and is anticipated to significantly enhance the efficiency of financial transactions in these sectors.

data.title: Norsk Hydro will release its Q3 results for 2025 on Oct 24, 2025, at 07:00 CEST. Details on hydro.com.
data.description: Hydro is scheduled to announce its third quarter results for 2025 at 07:00 CEST on October 24, 2025, which is 01:00 EDT, 06:00 BST, and 05:00 UTC/GMT. The quarterly report and presentation will be accessible simultaneously on hydro.com.

data.title: Alstom secures a €475m contract for rolling stock in Europe.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, Alstom, a renowned company specializing in intelligent and eco-friendly transportation solutions, disclosed a significant new development. They have secured a substantial order worth approximately €475 million from a client based in Europe. This order pertains to the provision of rolling stock, showcasing Alstom's ongoing commitment to promoting efficient and sustainable mobility solutions across the continent.

data.title: NBPE has conducted a transaction in its own shares, with restrictions in certain countries, including the US and Australia.
data.description: The data provided in this document is not intended for dissemination, publication, or distribution in Australia, Canada, Italy, Denmark, Japan, the United States, or to any citizen of these specified regions.

data.title: Uxin opens new used car superstore in Zhengzhou, China, launching on Sept 27, 2025, to cater to customers in Henan Province.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, Uxin Limited, a prominent used car retailer in China, shared news about the grand opening of its latest used car superstore in Zhengzhou, Henan Province. The unveiling is scheduled for September 27, 2025. This new superstore in Zhengzhou signifies a significant milestone for Uxin as it continues to expand its presence in the region. Uxin Limited, known for its quality services and wide selection of used cars, including various brands and models, aims to cater to the growing demand for pre-owned vehicles in the area. With the launch of this superstore, Uxin is set to provide customers in Zhengzhou and the surrounding areas with access to a diverse range of reliable used cars.

data.title: Hong Kong startup Ask.Legal revolutionizes legal services without funding, developed by DocPro Limited, a Cyberport and HKSTP incubatee.
data.description: In Hong Kong on September 26, 2025, a startup named Ask.Legal, created by DocPro Limited, is making waves in the legal tech industry. Despite being surrounded by unicorns and billion-dollar ventures, this company offers a secure, cost-effective, and remarkably precise AI solution. DocPro Limited is an incubatee of Cyberport and HKSTP, setting itself apart in a competitive industry landscape.

data.title: D-Link launches new Wi-Fi 7 dual-band routers for faster & reliable connectivity. TWSE: 2332, AQUILA PRO AI M36.
data.description: D-Link Corporation, a prominent player in networking solutions listed on TWSE as 2332, has unveiled its newest Wi-Fi 7 routers - the AQUILA PRO AI M36. This launch is designed to provide faster and more dependable connectivity for the upcoming era of smart homes.

data.title: BTFS Protocol v4.1 Beta released by BitTorrent Inc. with major upgrades in storage integration and network access.
data.description: BitTorrent Inc. has released the BTFS Protocol version 4.1 Beta which brings notable improvements such as enhanced storage integration and better network accessibility, as reported in a recent Medium post. The update aims to provide users with a more streamlined experience and improved functionality. This latest version introduces significant enhancements to the protocol, making it more efficient and user-friendly. Users can expect smoother storage integration and easier access to networks with this latest update.

data.title: Mesoblast confirms its cell therapy products are U.S. made, not subject to tariffs; leader in allogeneic cellular medicines.
data.description: On September 26, 2025, Mesoblast Limited, a global leader in allogeneic cellular medicines for inflammatory diseases, reaffirmed that its allogeneic cell therapy products, listed on Nasdaq as MESO and ASX as MSB, are crafted from U.S. donors within the U.S. This classification as U.S. origin products exempts them from tariffs that may be imposed on imported branded or patented pharmaceutical items.

data.title: Perpetual DEXs hit all-time high $70B daily volume, up 15%, led by Aster in market dominance.
data.description: On Thursday, cryptocurrency Perpetual decentralized exchanges (DEXs) achieved a groundbreaking milestone with a record-breaking $70 billion in daily trading volume. This represents a remarkable 15% increase in trading activity compared to previous days.
